calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Stanley W. Riddell, Esq., for Plaintiff: Polly Chan, present.
Wendy Marie Gibson, Esq. for Defendant: Cynthia Andrews, also present in court.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant shall vacate property located at 320 Quintara Street (in law unit) by 12:00 on 2/28/2007. Plaintiff waives $2,000.00 back rent up to 2/28/2007. Plaintiff shall return security deposit of $550.00. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare a stipulation for entry of judgment to be signed by both parties. Plaintiff shall pay the defendant $2,000.00 due upon signing the stip and $2,500.00 upon surrender of house keys. Failure by the defendant to comply with terms of the stip allows plaintiff to apply for judgment. If judgment is entered, defendant waives right to file motion to vacate judgment. The defendant shall not report to the SF Rent Board, Housing and Inspection Offices the terms of this agreement. Defendant shall share use of hot water with co-tenants. Total Settlement is $3,950.00 plus return of security deposit of $550.00 for a total of $4,500.00.
Parties to bear own fees and costs.
